name: SSE plc
description: SSE plc is a leading British multinational energy company headquartered in Perth, Scotland. It is primarily focused on the generation of renewable electricity and the development, ownership, and operation of electricity networks across the United Kingdom and Ireland. As a major player in the energy sector, SSE is committed to the net zero transition, investing heavily in offshore wind, hydro, and electricity transmission infrastructure. The company is listed on the London Stock Exchange and is a constituent of the FTSE 100 Index, playing a critical role in delivering a cleaner, more secure energy system.
